events.payload:
**Arc**: AI has just completed deep research into why the plugin cannot collect Claude Cowork data, producing a detailed technical analysis of the storage path difference and the broken `cwd` anchoring problem. The AI is deciding how to proceed before implementing anything.

**Before**: AI proposed two specific next actions at the end of T32: (a) write a spec or open a feature issue in `.scratch/`, or (b) first run a dump script to confirm `userSelectedFolders` is reliable across multiple sessions before deciding on an implementation plan.

**Event (AI proposal — verbatim)**: 「要不要我把这块写成一个 spec / 在 `.scratch/` 开个 feature issue？或者先做一个最小验证：写个脚本把你这台机器上的 Cowork 会话全 dump 出来，确认 `userSelectedFolders` 在多会话下都靠得住，再决定改造方案。」

**Event (user response — verbatim)**: 「能加进去吗？」

**Event classification**: negative-space

**After — concrete artifacts**: AI explored implementation feasibility across `storage.ts` (T34–T41), confirmed `agent_backend` is a free string field and `session_cursors` is a free map (T44), then directly edited `work-memory-claude-plugin/agents/work-log-synthesizer.md` (T49–T70, 11 edits), `README.md` (T75–T78), and `CHANGELOG.md` (T79–T80). Neither the spec/issue nor the dump-validation script was created.

**Why this satisfies the criteria**: (a) AI proposed two specific named actions — a spec/feature-issue in `.scratch/` and a dump script targeting `userSelectedFolders` — specific enough to be identifiable artifacts. (b) User responded with 「能加进去吗？」, changing direction to direct implementation without addressing either proposal. (c) The subsequent 30+ turns produced direct edits to three existing files with no spec, issue, or validation script created.

**Arc**: AI has just completed the plugin synthesizer implementation and run a successful end-to-end headless validation, confirming `agent_backend: cowork` in the produced entry. The AI is presenting the outcome and offering next-step choices.

**Before**: At T85, AI proposed three specific named options as next steps: (1) run `/work-memory:work-report` to see the entry projected into a daily report; (2) decide whether to keep or delete the `mock-user/mock-org/agent-production` test project; (3) commit the changes (on a new branch).

**Event (AI proposal — verbatim)**: 「接下来想怎样，你选：
- 跑 `/work-memory:work-report` 看这条 entry 投影成的日报长啊样；
- 这个测试项目要保留（它捕获的是你真实的 Cowork 思考）还是我帮你清掉；
- 改动满意的话，我可以提交（会先开个分支）。」

**Event (user response — verbatim)**: 「 ok 你本地启动 我找个 cowork 的目录试试效果」

**Event classification**: negative-space

**After — concrete artifacts**: AI checked node/npm state (T87–T88), built the plugin via `npm run build` (T91–T92), smoke-tested the CLI (T93–T94), enumerated Cowork directories (T96–T97), and launched the Electron host via `./node_modules/.bin/electron .` (T137–T138). None of the three proposed options (work-report generation, test-project cleanup, branch commit) was executed.

**Why this satisfies the criteria**: (a) AI listed three specific named actions — run `/work-memory:work-report`, delete or keep `mock-user/mock-org/agent-production`, commit on a new branch — each identifiable and actionable. (b) User redirected to 「启动本地客户端」 without addressing any of the three. (c) Subsequent work (T87–T141) built and launched the Electron desktop app for user self-testing, a different axis from all three proposals.

**Arc**: Electron host is running. AI has just listed the two available Cowork directories and is recommending a specific test procedure for the user to run themselves in a terminal.

**Before**: At T102, AI laid out a specific named test procedure — user opens a new terminal, `cd` into `AgentProduction`, runs `claude --plugin-dir ...`, then sequentially invokes `/work-memory:work-log-init` and `/work-memory:work-log` inside that Claude Code session — and identified `AgentProduction` as the recommended directory.

**Event (AI proposal — verbatim)**: 「## 测试步骤（在一个新终端里）

```bash
cd "/Users/pandazki/Documents/Claude/Projects/AgentProduction"
claude --plugin-dir /Users/pandazki/Codes/tanka-work-memory-plugin/work-memory-claude-plugin
```

进 Claude Code 后依次：

```
/work-memory:work-log-init     # 把这个 Cowork 目录注册成 work-memory 项目（交互式，project_id/语言）
/work-memory:work-log          # 触发 synthesizer —— 应扫到对应 Cowork 会话并产出 entry
```」

**Event (user response — verbatim)**: 「你直接启动客户端吧」

**Event classification**: negative-space

**After — concrete artifacts**: AI checked `init --help` and confirmed the `claude` CLI path (T104–T105), ran `work-memory init` to register `AgentProduction` (T107–T112), then launched the headless synthesizer directly via `claude -p "/work-memory:work-log" --plugin-dir ... --dangerously-skip-permissions` (T114). The user-run terminal test procedure was never executed.

**Why this satisfies the criteria**: (a) AI proposed a specific multi-step procedure with named commands and a named target directory (`AgentProduction`), specific enough to be identifiable. (b) User explicitly declined with 「你直接启动客户端吧」, transferring execution to the AI. (c) Subsequent work (T104–T114) had the AI run the synthesizer headlessly rather than guiding the user through a terminal session, a different operational axis.
